sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111224" key="filokiqaristh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-κῐθᾰριστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n111224.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lover of the cithara,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.633a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
